title: Chicken100
body:
# Chicken100: Egg-to-Chicken Enhancement

## Overview
Transform your Minecraft egg-throwing experience with this delightful plugin that guarantees chicken spawns from thrown eggs. Say goodbye to the vanilla 1/8 chance and hello to customizable egg mechanics that add both fun and utility to your server!

## Key Features

### 💯 Guaranteed Chicken Spawning
- Configure spawn chance from 0-100% (default: 100%)
- Never waste eggs again when farming chickens

### 🐣 Multiple Chickens
- Each egg can spawn multiple chickens based on your configuration
- Set minimum and maximum spawn counts to control population growth
- Includes a chance for adorable baby chickens

### 🎮 Player Experience Enhancements
- Optional player notifications when chickens spawn
- Visual feedback with particle effects
- Satisfying sound effects on successful spawns

### ⚙️ Fully Configurable
- Adjust every aspect of the plugin through a simple config file
- Fine-tune spawn rates and features to match your server's needs
- Easy to use with zero commands required

### 🔄 Server-Friendly
- Lightweight implementation with minimal performance impact
- Compatible with Paper, Spigot, and Bukkit servers
- Works with Minecraft 1.20 and newer versions

## Why Choose This Plugin?

This enhancement strikes the perfect balance between utility and fun. For survival servers, it eliminates the frustration of wasting eggs when trying to start a chicken farm. For minigame servers, it creates opportunities for egg-throwing competitions with guaranteed results.

The configurable nature means server administrators can tailor the experience precisely to their community's needs - whether you want a slight boost to spawn rates or guaranteed multiple chickens from every egg.

Unlike other farming plugins that may overwhelm players with complex mechanics, this focused enhancement is intuitive and requires no learning curve for your players. They'll immediately understand and appreciate the improved egg mechanics.

## Server Integration

This plugin integrates seamlessly with existing farm setups, chicken breeding mechanisms, and egg collection systems. The lightweight implementation ensures no server lag even when multiple players are throwing eggs simultaneously.

Perfect for skyblock servers where resources are limited, survival servers where quality-of-life improvements are valued, or any server looking to add a touch of whimsy to the vanilla mechanics without dramatically altering gameplay.

## Installation

1. Download the plugin JAR file
2. Place it in your server's plugins folder
3. Start or restart your server
4. Configure options in the config.yml file (optional)
5. Enjoy your enhanced egg mechanics!
